<?php /** * This file is part of the ZBateson\MailMimeParser project. * * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/bsd-license.php BSD */ namespace ZBateson\MbWrapper; use RuntimeException; /** * Exception thrown if MbWrapper can't convert from or two a specified charset. * * @author Zaahid Bateson */ class UnsupportedCharsetException extends RuntimeException { }
